MASTER CALENDAR JURY ASBESTOS
Off Calendar Mar-30-2023 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY ASBESTOS
Off Calendar Aug-21-2023 Set For Order To Show Cause On Apr-04-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 503

MOTION FOR PREFERENCE / PREFERENTIAL SETTING
Off Calendar Mar-30-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES Via CourtCall:
Fred Gatt of LEADER, BERKON, COLAO & SILVERSTEIN LLP (213-234-1750), appearing for defendant Imo Industries, Inc.
Michelle Golden of PRINDLE, GOETZ, BARNES & REINHOLTZ, LLP (415-788-8354), appearing for defendant Syd Carpenter and Marine Contractor, Inc.

RULING:
Not contested, not argued and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff's Motion for Order Maintaining the Current Trial Date with Preference is GRANTED pursuant to C.C.P. section 36(a). The July 31, 2023 trial date is vacated. The new trial date is July 17, 2023 at 11:15 a.m. in Department 503. Last day pursuant to C.C.P. section 36(f) is July 28, 2023. All pre-trial dates and deadlines remain dictated by the July 31, 2023 trial date.

Plaintiffs to make a settlement demand on defendants no later than June 2, 2023. Responses to the demand are due no later than June 16, 2023. The parties are ordered to provide confidential settlement demands/offers stating their best and final settlement effort. This confidential value must be separately submitted to Pang Ly via electronic mail by July 7, 2023 at 12:00 p.m. Mandatory settlement conference is set for Thursday, July 13, 2023 at 9 a.m. in 603. Personal appearance is required by all unless a party is granted excuse based on good cause. Order signed in open court. Judge: Samuel K. Feng, Clerk: A. Mok. Not reported. (503/SKF)

DEPT 206 ASBESTOS TRIAL SETTING CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-20-2022 Set For Trial On Jul-31-23 At 11:15 A.M. In Dept 503

ASBESTOS CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-18-2022 Continued To Oct-20-22 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 503

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Substituting Mary Bacich As Successor-In-Interest To, And Substituting Successor-In-Interest For, Deceased Plaintiff; For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jul-14-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES Via CourtCall:
Jocelyn M. Soriano of BHC Law Group, LLP (510-658-3600), appearing for defendant M. Slayen Associates.

RULING:
Not contested and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiffs' Motion for Order Substituting Mary Bacich as Successor-in-Interest to, and Substituting Successor-in-Interest for, Deceased Plaintiff is GRANTED under Code of Civil Procedure section 377.31. No opposition filed. Mary Bacich is substituted as successor-in-interest to deceased plaintiff Robert Bacich. Plaintiffs' request to file a First Amended Complaint is GRANTED. The First Amended Complaint is deemed served on all defendants who have previously appeared herein, as of the date of the granting of the motion to amend. Order signed in open court. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: A. Mok. Not reported. (503/CML)
